case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. MARTHA GUADALUPE ALDANA INTERIAN

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $55.00) SERVED JUN-21-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT INTERIAN, MARTHA GUADALUPE ALDANA
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-15-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-06-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MARICRUZ CEDANO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANNE WONG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-06-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT INTERIAN, MARTHA GUADALUPE ALDANA $2,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,305.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
